titleStmt.title: Unho-zan kankai shi — full IIIF rubbing volume (rubbing)
雲峰山観海詩（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Unho-zan kankai shi — full IIIF rubbing volume. Holding institution: National Diet Library (NDL) 国立国会図書館 (provider ndl), surfaced via Japan Search. Full IIIF Presentation manifest verified: label '雲峰山観海詩', 63 canvases; first canvas image and IIIF thumbnail both verified HTTP 200 image/jpeg.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Reproduction/rubbing volume of Zheng Daozhao's Yunfengshan 觀海詩; original Northern Wei

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
